title: London - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
London - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College in London
A global city at the center of finance, tech, and history
At the heart of the global economy, London offers a unique environment for your Khoury College journey. Northeastern’s London campus in the St. Katharine Docks district provides an intellectual center for many cultural treasures and exciting opportunities in and around London, including views of the London Tower Bridge.
Start your education on our London campus
The
Northeastern University London Scholars program
offers first-year students a rigorous academic environment in one of the most culturally vibrant cities in the world. Northeastern University London’s unique global position will allow you to amplify your experience by living, studying, and growing in London during your first year of college.
A worldwide business and tech hub
From its renowned financial industry to thriving technology companies like Vodaphone and Mimecast, London is the United Kingdom’s business capital and a great place to launch your CS education. After a fast-paced, interdisciplinary experience in London, students return to Boston to complete their degrees.
Picture yourself in London
Located against the backdrop of London Bridge.
A great campus for learning and living.
Contemporary and comfy study space.
Learn and study in the heart of London.

A cross-cultural and interdisciplinary experience
The Northeastern London campus provides a comfortable and modern space for collaboration and learning, with modern classrooms and soundproofed pods for meetings or solo work. A robotics lab and the Network Science Institute are a few of the active research facilities on campus, while entrepreneurial spaces and an innovation lab help you launch your ideas.
Within sight of the Tower Bridge, the campus is at the heart of London. From renowned plays to storied museums, cultural experiences enrich your time in London. Through interdisciplinary coursework that integrates the humanities with computer science, courses touch on cultural exchange and the real-world impacts and applications of your skills.
A place to work and a place to grow
Explore the London campus with Kevin, a Khoury College student.
Featured faculty: Alexandros Koliousis
Alexandros Koliousis is an associate professor of computer science at Northeastern University London. His research explores the intersection of scalable data systems and deep learning.
